lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Anti-Xeno Initiative Wiki
sources.what: Community AX doctrine: interceptor kill orders, AX/Guardian weapon loadouts, and heart-cycle tactics.

sources.label: Fandom — Thargoid Interceptor
sources.what: Interceptor variants, exertion heart/hull rules, and shutdown/swarm mechanics.

sources.label: Fandom — Thargoid Combat
sources.what: AX weapon identities, caustic/thermal damage rules, and engagement mechanics.

sources.label: Inara — Thargoid War
sources.what: War-state and Titan progress, AX gear sellers, Guardian tech-broker unlocks, and rescue megaships.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Titan assault walkthrough: required modules, the heat-vent thermal-core damage loop, and surviving the EMP shockwave and caustic cloud.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream build of an AX Alliance Chieftain for interceptor hunting, covering AX and Guardian weapon and module choices.
